auth.label: API Key
auth.description: WebScraping.AI API key sent as the api_key query parameter. Create or view it from the WebScraping.AI dashboard: https://webscraping.ai/dashboard.

actions.name: extract_text
actions.description: Extract visible text from one target page with WebScraping.AI.

url.description: The target page URL WebScraping.AI should retrieve.

additionalProperties.description: One header value sent to the target page.

headers.description: HTTP headers WebScraping.AI should send to the target page.

timeout.description: Maximum target page retrieval time in milliseconds.

js.description: Whether WebScraping.AI should execute on-page JavaScript.

jsTimeout.description: Maximum JavaScript rendering time in milliseconds.

waitFor.description: A CSS selector WebScraping.AI should wait for before returning.

proxy.description: The WebScraping.AI proxy pool to use for the target page.

country.description: The proxy country code to use for the target page.

device.description: The browser device profile WebScraping.AI should emulate.

errorOn404.description: Whether target page HTTP 404 responses should be returned as errors.

errorOnRedirect.description: Whether target page redirects should be returned as errors.

jsScript.description: Custom JavaScript code to execute on the target page.

returnLinks.description: Whether WebScraping.AI should include links when textFormat is json.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for extracting page text with WebScraping.AI.

content.description: The response body returned by WebScraping.AI.

statusCode.description: The HTTP status code returned by WebScraping.AI.

anyOf.description: The response Content-Type header when returned.

actions.name: fetch_html
actions.description: Fetch the rendered HTML content of one target page with WebScraping.AI.

url.description: The target page URL WebScraping.AI should retrieve.

additionalProperties.description: One header value sent to the target page.

headers.description: HTTP headers WebScraping.AI should send to the target page.

timeout.description: Maximum target page retrieval time in milliseconds.

js.description: Whether WebScraping.AI should execute on-page JavaScript.

jsTimeout.description: Maximum JavaScript rendering time in milliseconds.

waitFor.description: A CSS selector WebScraping.AI should wait for before returning.

proxy.description: The WebScraping.AI proxy pool to use for the target page.

country.description: The proxy country code to use for the target page.

device.description: The browser device profile WebScraping.AI should emulate.

errorOn404.description: Whether target page HTTP 404 responses should be returned as errors.

errorOnRedirect.description: Whether target page redirects should be returned as errors.

jsScript.description: Custom JavaScript code to execute on the target page.

returnScriptResult.description: Whether to return the custom JavaScript result instead of the page HTML.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for fetching page HTML with WebScraping.AI.

content.description: The response body returned by WebScraping.AI.

statusCode.description: The HTTP status code returned by WebScraping.AI.

anyOf.description: The response Content-Type header when returned.

actions.name: get_account_info
actions.description: Retrieve WebScraping.AI account email, quota, reset, and concurrency details.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for retrieving WebScraping.AI account info.

email.description: The account email returned by WebScraping.AI.

remaining_api_calls.description: Remaining API call credits in the current billing period.

resets_at.description: Next billing cycle start time as a UNIX timestamp.

remaining_concurrency.description: Remaining concurrent requests for the account.

outputSchema.description: The output payload for retrieving WebScraping.AI account info.

actions.name: select_html
actions.description: Fetch HTML for one selected target page area with WebScraping.AI.

url.description: The target page URL WebScraping.AI should retrieve.

additionalProperties.description: One header value sent to the target page.

headers.description: HTTP headers WebScraping.AI should send to the target page.

timeout.description: Maximum target page retrieval time in milliseconds.

js.description: Whether WebScraping.AI should execute on-page JavaScript.

jsTimeout.description: Maximum JavaScript rendering time in milliseconds.

waitFor.description: A CSS selector WebScraping.AI should wait for before returning.

proxy.description: The WebScraping.AI proxy pool to use for the target page.

country.description: The proxy country code to use for the target page.

device.description: The browser device profile WebScraping.AI should emulate.

errorOn404.description: Whether target page HTTP 404 responses should be returned as errors.

errorOnRedirect.description: Whether target page redirects should be returned as errors.

jsScript.description: Custom JavaScript code to execute on the target page.

selector.description: The CSS selector for the page area to return.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for selecting one page area with WebScraping.AI.

content.description: The response body returned by WebScraping.AI.

statusCode.description: The HTTP status code returned by WebScraping.AI.

anyOf.description: The response Content-Type header when returned.

actions.name: select_multiple_html
actions.description: Fetch HTML for multiple selected target page areas with WebScraping.AI.

url.description: The target page URL WebScraping.AI should retrieve.

additionalProperties.description: One header value sent to the target page.

headers.description: HTTP headers WebScraping.AI should send to the target page.

timeout.description: Maximum target page retrieval time in milliseconds.

js.description: Whether WebScraping.AI should execute on-page JavaScript.

jsTimeout.description: Maximum JavaScript rendering time in milliseconds.

waitFor.description: A CSS selector WebScraping.AI should wait for before returning.

proxy.description: The WebScraping.AI proxy pool to use for the target page.

country.description: The proxy country code to use for the target page.

device.description: The browser device profile WebScraping.AI should emulate.

errorOn404.description: Whether target page HTTP 404 responses should be returned as errors.

errorOnRedirect.description: Whether target page redirects should be returned as errors.

jsScript.description: Custom JavaScript code to execute on the target page.

items.description: One CSS selector for a page area.

selectors.description: CSS selectors for the page areas to return.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for selecting multiple page areas with WebScraping.AI.

items.description: One selected HTML snippet returned by WebScraping.AI.

areas.description: HTML snippets returned for each requested selector.

statusCode.description: The HTTP status code returned by WebScraping.AI.

anyOf.description: The response Content-Type header when returned.
